{"slots":{"1":{"name":"databank1","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"2":{"name":"databank2","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-1":{"name":"unit","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-2":{"name":"construct","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-3":{"name":"player","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-4":{"name":"system","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-5":{"name":"library","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}}},"handlers":[{"code":"--unit.onStart()\nlocal wiped=0\nif databank1 then databank1.clear(); wiped=wiped+1; system.print(\"Wiped databank1\") end\nif databank2 then databank2.clear(); wiped=wiped+1; system.print(\"Wiped databank2\") end\nif wiped==0 then\n  system.print(\"No databanks found — check slot names are databank1 and databank2\")\nelse\n  system.print(\"Done. Wiped \"..wiped..\" databank(s).\")\nend\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"0"}],"methods":[],"events":[]}
